description: Event handler that reduces suppression on allied actors within range when a skill is applied. Part of the tactical skill effects system.

RallyHandler$$OnApply.signature: void OnApply(RallyHandler this, Actor sourceActor, unknown param3, Tile targetTile)
RallyHandler$$OnApply.purpose: Main handler called when the Rally skill effect is applied to a tile. Reduces suppression on any actor occupying the target tile.

Rally$$.ctor.purpose: Constructor that initializes default values for the Rally effect template.

Rally$$Create.purpose: Factory method that creates a new RallyHandler instance and links it to the Rally effect template.

rally_effect_template.name: BaseSuppressionReduction
rally_effect_template.description: Base amount of suppression reduction applied at distance 1. This is the maximum possible reduction before distance falloff is applied.

rally_effect_template.name: SuppressionFalloffPerDistance
rally_effect_template.description: Amount of suppression reduction lost per additional tile of distance beyond 1. The effective reduction formula is: BaseReduction - (distance - 1) * FalloffPerDistance, with a minimum of 0.

rally_handler_instance.name: Skill
rally_handler_instance.description: Pointer to the owning skill instance. Used to access the actor/entity that owns this handler.

rally_handler_instance.name: EffectTemplate
rally_handler_instance.description: Pointer to the Rally effect template containing configuration (BaseSuppressionReduction, FalloffPerDistance).

actor_fields_referenced.name: Suppression
actor_fields_referenced.description: Current suppression value of the actor. Rally only affects actors with Suppression > 0.

algorithm.formula: effectiveReduction = max(0, BaseSuppressionReduction - max(0, distance - 1) * SuppressionFalloffPerDistance)
steps: 1. Check if target tile has an actor
2. Skip if the actor is the same as the source actor (self-rally not allowed)
3. Check if actor has Suppression > 0 (no effect on unsuppressed actors)
4. Calculate distance from source actor to target tile
5. Calculate distance penalty: (distance - 1) if distance > 1, else 0
7. Clamp effective reduction to minimum of 0
8. If effective reduction > 0, call Actor.ChangeSuppressionAndUpdateAP with negative value

key_discoveries.discovery: Suppression is stored as a float at Actor+0x15C. Rally reduces suppression by calling Actor.ChangeSuppressionAndUpdateAP with a negative value.
Rally effect strength decreases linearly with distance. At default values (base=80, falloff=10), the effect becomes zero at distance 9 or greater.
The rally effect explicitly excludes the source actor (the one using the skill) from receiving suppression reduction.
Effect handlers follow a template pattern where RallyHandler (runtime instance) references a Rally (configuration template) at offset 0x18. The template holds the configurable parameters.
Rally extends BaseEffect which extends Unity's TileBase. This suggests skill effects may be tile-based assets in Unity's tilemap system.
RallyHandler inherits from SkillEventHandler which provides GetActor(), GetEntity(), and GetOwner() methods via the Skill reference at offset 0x10.
ChangeSuppressionAndUpdateAP handles suppression state transitions (Normal/Suppressed/Pinned) and automatically adjusts Action Points. Suppressed state costs 30 AP, Pinned state sets AP to 0.

Actor$$ChangeSuppressionAndUpdateAP.purpose: Updates suppression value and handles AP changes for state transitions between Normal(0), Suppressed(1), and Pinned(2) states.

Tile$$HasActor.purpose: Checks if a tile has an actor on it.

Tile$$GetActor.purpose: Returns the actor on a tile.

Entity$$GetDistanceTo.purpose: Calculates the distance from an entity to a tile.

ghidra_comments_added.content: Rally.BaseSuppressionReduction (offset 0x58): Base suppression reduction amount. Default value is 80 (0x50). This is the maximum suppression reduction applied at distance 1.

Rally.SuppressionFalloffPerDistance (offset 0x5C): Suppression reduction falloff per tile of distance beyond 1. Default value is 10. Effective reduction = BaseReduction - (distance-1) * FalloffPerDistance, minimum 0.
Actor.Suppression check at offset 0x15C: Only apply rally effect to actors with suppression > 0
RallyHandler+0x18: Pointer to the Rally effect template containing the configuration fields
RallyHandler+0x18: Stores the Rally effect template reference. This links the handler instance to its configuration data.
